title: The Last Birthday
tagline: Can truth be restored without erasing love?

profile.name: Helen Chen
profile.context: A grieving parent preserves a birthday ritual after her son's death.

memories.title: Birthday table
memories.summary: A place is set for someone who never arrives.
memories.evidence: The unused plate is clean while the other place settings show fresh use.

memories.title: Hospital notice
memories.summary: An official record names the cause and date of death.
memories.evidence: The signed record confirms a fatal road collision two years earlier.

memories.title: Dusty bedroom
memories.summary: The room has not been occupied for a long time.
memories.evidence: Dust covers an unfinished model and the bed remains untouched.
